papers.title: Experimental insights into entrance channel parameters for the $^{19}\mathrm{F}+^{93}\mathrm{Nb}$ system: Signature of incomplete fusion
papers.authors: Anuj Kumar Jashwal, Avinash Agarwal, Harsh Vardhan, Munish Kumar, Kamal Kumar, Sunil Dutt, Mohd. Faizan Khan, I. A. Rizvi, and A. K. Chaubey
papers.summary: Author(s): Anuj Kumar Jashwal, Avinash Agarwal, Harsh Vardhan, Munish Kumar, Kamal Kumar, Sunil Dutt, Mohd. Faizan Khan, I. A. Rizvi, and A. K. ChaubeyIn the present work, experimental study of incomplete fusion in the $^{19}\mathrm{F}+^{93}\mathrm{Nb}$ system has been carried out in the energy range of $≈$ 3–6 MeV/nucleon. The off-line $γ$-ray spectrometry was used to measure the cross sections of evaporation residues populated in this system. Th…[Phys. Rev. C 113, 034615] Published Fri Mar 20, 2026
